{{Quote|In Mellichae's name, you shall perish!|Kylaena Haley, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TNH" />}}
'''Kylaena Haley''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was a member of the [[Sith Shadows]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kylaena Haley was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TNH" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Kylaena Haley was added to the game along with the [[W:c:swg:Axkva Min|"Axkva Min" Heroic Encounter]],<ref name="SWG:TNH" /> introduced with the release of the [[W:c:swg:Chapter 7 Notes for Nov 1 2007|"Chapter 7" update]], on [[November 1]], [[2007]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 7: A Collection of Heroes">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67485&month=102007|text=Chapter 7: A Collection of Heroes}}</ref>

Kylaena was the nickname of ''Star Wars Galaxies'' designer [[Janessa Johansson]].<ref>{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=swggpdiscussion&message.id=994272|text=Meet the SWG Devs and Team: Come Say Hi!}}</ref>
